title: 'No Fixed System of War': Navy Chief Admiral Tripathi Links Modern Warfare to Arthashastra; Says, 'West Asia Tensions a Reminder'
description: Drawing from ancient Indian thought, he referenced Kautilya's Arthashastra to underscore the integrated approach to statecraft and warfare. Admiral Tripathi noted that this principle of integrated application of various instruments of power remains relevant in modern military doctrines worldwide.
